  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "NM cable is routed through wood/metal framing members within 1-1/4 inches of the nearest edge of the stud without a protective steel nail plate."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install a steel shield plate (nail plate) at least 1/16 inch thick at the framing member where the cable passes through to protect the cable from penetration by screws or nails."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 300.4(A)(1) requires that where cables are installed through bored holes in framing members and the hole is closer than 1-1/4 inches from the nearest edge of the member, the cable must be protected by a steel plate at least 1/16 inch thick.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 300.4(A)(1)",
    "NEC 334"
  ]
}
